Our Services

Professional electrical contractor solutions for every need

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Ensure your home's electrical system can handle today's power demands.

Learn More →

Whole-House Rewiring

Replace outdated or damaged wiring for a safer and more efficient home.

Learn More →

Lighting Installation

Enhance your home's ambiance and functionality with professional lighting installation.

Learn More →

Outlet and Switch Repair

Reliable repairs for faulty outlets and switches, ensuring your electrical system is safe.

Learn More →

Electrical Inspections

Comprehensive electrical inspections to identify potential hazards and ensure code compliance.

Learn More →

Generator Installation

Protect your home from power outages with a professionally installed generator.

Learn More →
Reli Electric

Trusted electrical contractor professionals serving Columbus, OH and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
